title: stachys recta subsp. ramosissima
intro: Stachys recta subsp. ramosissima, also known as the 'Rigid Woundwort', is a subspecies of the Stachys recta plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stachys recta subsp. ramosissima include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be used in salves and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
